content_body: We came for a surprise Father's Day getaway, and what a great surprise it was. The cabin was wonderful and just what we needed to relax and unwind from everyday life. We rented a boat from North Georgia Watersports and spent the day on the water. One evening, we ate at Blue Jeans Pizza and it was great. We had a lot of fun playing pool and the relaxing in the hot tub. As for downtown, we enjoyed the shops and would highly recommend them. Thank you!
title: What A Great Surprise Trip!
